block_01: Filter the noise to detect the trend
block_02: You’ve probably heard that short-term price fluctuations can be misleading. So how can you see the difference between random price movements and actual trends?
block_03: Zigzag indicator is a simple tool that filters out minor price changes to identify larger swings that can be used for trading. Learn to apply this tool and choose the best settings in this material.
